title: Freelance Course Consultant (B2B & B2C Training)
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Prospect and engage clients for public and in-house training programmes

  • Drive sales conversations from initial contact to course confirmation

  • Promote leadership, management, people, and professional skills courses

  • Build and maintain client relationships

  • Coordinate with internal teams on course details, pricing, and schedules

B2B Sales Requirements (Corporate Clients)

Applicants applying for B2B sales must meet one of the following:

Option 1: With Existing Corporate Network

  • Have direct access to HR leaders, business owners, or decision-makers

  • Able to activate existing contacts and convert opportunities

Option 2: Without Existing Network

  • Willing and prepared to perform direct sales outreach, including:

    • Cold calls and emails

    • Physical door-knocking at SME offices

    • Persistent follow-ups

  • Comfortable handling rejection and long sales cycles

This is not a referral-only or inbound-leads role.

B2C Sales Scope

  • Promote public courses and individual enrolments

  • Engage individuals through direct outreach, referrals, and personal networks

  • Suitable for candidates with community, professional, or learner networks

Requirements

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills

  • Self-motivated and disciplined

  • Comfortable with commission-based work

  • Prior experience in training, education, HR, recruitment, or sales is an advantage

postedCompany.description:
Tyson Jay is a leading recruitment agency in Singapore that excels in delivering holistic solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. Specializing in executive search, permanent placement and career coaching, we are dedicated to aligning talent strategies with organizational goals to drive sustained business success.

With expertise in recruitment, we leverage our deep industry knowledge and extensive networks to identify and attract top talent that fits seamlessly into our clients' teams. At Tyson Jay, we foster a culture of collaboration, emphasizing teamwork and shared goals. We believe in working closely with our clients to understand their challenges and aspirations, ensuring that together, we achieve impactful results.

Our personalized coaching programs empower professionals, guiding them through strategic career advancements and personal growth. By combining expert recruitment services with tailored career development strategies, Tyson Jay stands as your trusted partner in building resilient and high performing teams. In addition, we offer personalised coaching designed to guide professionals towards career advancement.


Connect with us at www.tysonjay.sg
